title: System verilog Port Declaration Problem
body:
Hello people !  I would like thank you guys to your contribution in icarus verilog program is very nice ! im alredy working with it using pli/vpi mixed with systemC and it works well. Sure some times i get troubles but its ok. 

My problem resume i need simulate a IP coded in system verilog and when i try run it , show syntax errors. I have looked on source code and i see this kind of declaration is not accepted in module.

example:
my_module
                 (
                           CURRENTSTATE
                 );
output logic [2:0]  CURRENTSTATE;
endmodule

Logic declared inside modules is accepted.
example:

my_module
                 (
                          output logic [2:0]  CURRENTSTATE
                 );
endmodule

Another problem i have seen is always_ff is not accepted "not sure about this". 

I know across Source Forge forum system verilog inst complete yet but is good show this to know if is a problem or not.
